aim: Evaluate point bias RMSE convergence and interval accounting for q1 structured mu and sigma cells.
dgp: Gaussian single-response distributional regression with one structured random effect and varied matrix condition number sample size signal and boundary proximity.
estimand: Structured SD and selected fixed effects for mu and sigma endpoints.
methods: Native TMB ML first; direct DRM.jl and R-via-Julia only after parity fixtures exist.
mcse_target: coverage MCSE <= 1 percent requires about 500 replicates per calibrated cell
failed_fit_policy: Failed fits boundary flags and unavailable intervals remain in denominators.
interval_policy: No coverage claim until finite intervals and MCSE are reported.
claim_boundary: Q1 ADEMP design only; no calibrated grid has run.
next_gate: Write runner after fixture contracts pass.

aim: Evaluate q2 location-covariance target recovery without collapsing q2 into q2-plus-q2 or q4.
dgp: Gaussian bivariate location model with structured correlation in mu1 and mu2 and varied correlation magnitude matrix type sample size and signal.
estimand: Mean-side structured SDs and one mean-mean covariance or correlation target.
methods: Native TMB ML first; direct DRM.jl and bridge routes only when same-target payload exists.
mcse_target: coverage MCSE <= 1 percent requires about 500 replicates per calibrated cell
failed_fit_policy: Failed fits and derived-unavailable targets remain in denominators.
interval_policy: Intervals remain planned until direct target and calibrated grid exist.
claim_boundary: Q2 ADEMP design only; no q2 coverage claim.
next_gate: Write q2 runner after target contract is stable.

aim: Evaluate q4 all-four point recovery while keeping direct SD targets separate from derived correlations.
dgp: Gaussian bivariate location-scale model with structured effects on mu1 mu2 sigma1 and sigma2 and varied cross-axis dependence boundary proximity and matrix condition.
estimand: Four structured SD targets and explicitly derived cross-axis correlations.
methods: Native TMB ML point fit first; bridge and REML routes excluded until derivation and parity exist.
mcse_target: coverage MCSE <= 1 percent requires about 500 replicates per calibrated cell
failed_fit_policy: Failed fits and non-finite derived intervals remain in denominators.
interval_policy: No q4 interval coverage until finite direct and derived interval accounting passes.
claim_boundary: Q4 ADEMP design only; no calibrated q4 grid has run.
next_gate: Write q4 pilot runner with finite-interval accounting.
